title: Barrett Layer Census - PART 1 Artifacts
status_reason: Layer inventory compiled from committed evidence. Full frequency counts require LOCAL_OPERATOR access to gitignored DXF JSON files.

layer_inventory.description: Compiled 31 unique layer names from all committed evidence sources

cleanliness_ranking_json.description: Converted the 74-file cleanliness ranking from markdown to structured JSON

full_layer_frequency_counts.description: Per-layer frequency counts (how many of the 74 files contain each layer, total entity counts per layer) require parsing the raw DXF JSON files at source/barrett/json/
full_layer_frequency_counts.reason: DXF JSON files are gitignored and exist only on local Windows machine
full_layer_frequency_counts.action_required: Run layer enumeration script against all 74 parsed JSON files and update barrett_layer_frequency_table.json with actual counts

undiscovered_layers.description: The 31 layers catalogued are only those referenced in committed config/definition files. Actual DXF files may contain additional layers not yet documented.
undiscovered_layers.action_required: Cross-reference enumerated layers from JSON files against the current 31-layer inventory to identify any missing layers

evidence_basis.contribution: 11 layer names with semantic roles and ownership roles (RamProof GC family ground truth)
3 owned layers, 5 context layers, 3 annotation layers
4 owned layers, 4 context layers, 3 annotation layers
3 owned layers, 5 context layers, 3 annotation layers
5 owned layers, 5 context layers, 3 annotation layers
74 files with noise scores, layer counts, entity counts, annotation/context ratios
